commit.subject: LU-16933 tests: conf-sanity/79 use correct ostvdev
commit.message:
LU-16933 tests: conf-sanity/79 use correct ostvdev

conf-sanity/79 use correct ostvdev when calling
mkfs

Test-Parameters: trivial fstype=zfs testlist=conf-sanity env=ONLY=79,ONLY_REPEAT=25
Signed-off-by: Arshad Hussain <arshad.hussain@aeoncomputing.com>
Change-Id: I24a7a75bc19c8c186937e69789e3b1498c4fb4de
